topTopic.name: The Odyssey storms global box office
topTopic.why: Multiple independent headlines across outlets (Oman Observer, Hotpress, Standard, TheWrap, EUalive, KPI) report The Odyssey dominating box office records and revenue, making it the day's dominant conversation.
